bands.label: Need Attention
bands.summary: Material reliability, ownership, or execution gaps; requires close supervision and remediation.

bands.label: Productivity
bands.summary: Competent day-to-day execution; dependable but not yet driving systemic change or full autonomy.

bands.label: Performance
bands.summary: Strong ownership, proactive problem-solving, systems thinking, and positive influence on client teams.

levels.descriptor: Critical gaps; trust or delivery at risk.
Reliable on assigned tasks; uneven depth.
Takes ownership beyond tasks; good judgment.

assessmentDimensions.name: Reliability and follow-through
assessmentDimensions.description: Meets commitments, closes loops, communicates delays early.

assessmentDimensions.name: Ownership and initiative
assessmentDimensions.description: Identifies problems without waiting to be told; proposes next steps.

assessmentDimensions.name: Systems building
assessmentDimensions.description: Creates checklists, trackers, cadences, or SOPs that outlast ad-hoc fixes.

assessmentDimensions.name: Stakeholder communication
assessmentDimensions.description: Clear updates to supervisor and client team; appropriate escalation.

assessmentDimensions.name: How the team responds to the Fellow
assessmentDimensions.description: Trust, friction, adoption of Fellow-led rituals, informal feedback from floor.

assessmentDimensions.name: Problem diagnosis and prioritization
assessmentDimensions.description: Correct root causes vs symptoms; focuses on highest leverage work.

assessmentDimensions.name: Execution pace and quality
assessmentDimensions.description: Throughput vs rework; attention to detail in operational work.

assessmentDimensions.name: Professional conduct and judgment
assessmentDimensions.description: Confidentiality, boundaries, conflict handling, alignment with client culture.
